title: Checkdiff and direct MWCC validation
description: Run tool-local checkdiff, summary diff, and direct MWCC translation-unit compile checks against a target project checkout.
status_message: Tool-local implementation: APIs invoke toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/_impl/gamecube/tools/checkdiff.py and ninja_compile.py with ORCH_PROJECT_REPO_ROOT bound to the selected project checkout.
limitations: Requires a built project checkout with build/GC6E01/report.json, build.ninja, target objects, objdiff-cli, sjiswrap, dtk, MWCC compiler artifacts, and an MWCC runner. The runner prefers MWCC_WIBO or project-state wibo, then repo-local/PATH wibo, with Wine as fallback.
checkdiff may run fix_includes.py before compiling, so use it only when source edits are allowed for the target checkout.
Direct compile reports compiler viability for a translation unit; objdiff/checkdiff is still needed to prove a source change improved the target.

usage.agent_guidance: Use as part of attempt evaluation when a concrete source edit needs compile/checkdiff feedback. Do not treat this as a mandatory action after every small edit.
